chunks.text: H I G H C O U R T O F S I N D H A T K A R A C H I F.R.A. No.44 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Appellant: Mandviwalla Entertainment (Pvt.) Ltd., through Mr. Hassan Ali and Mr. Hasan Mandviwalla, Advocates Respondent No.1: Regent Properties (Pvt.) Ltd. through Mr. Basil Nabi Malik along with Mr. Bilal Ahmed Khan, Advocates Respondent No.2: Rent Controller Karachi Cantonment Date of hearing: 22.09.2025 and 30.09.2025 Date of Order: 02.12.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to follow, the above- titled first rent appeal is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
